message:
✨ Add build failure detection to copilot-automation

- Add check_run trigger for Netlify build completions
- When Netlify build fails, automatically notify @Copilot
- Avoid duplicate notifications within 30 minutes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
